lessons.title: The Ghost in the Machine: What is a Process?
lessons.description: Understand PIDs, parent-child relationships, and the lifecycle of running programs.

lessons.title: Process Surveillance: The `ps` Command
lessons.description: Take a snapshot of running processes. Learn the essential `ps aux` and custom formats.

lessons.title: The Living Monitor: `top` and `htop`
lessons.description: Watch processes in real-time. Identify CPU hogs and memory leaks interactively.

lessons.title: Digital Execution: `kill`, `pkill`, and Signals
lessons.description: Terminate misbehaving processes gracefully or forcefully. Master the art of sending signals.

lessons.title: The Background Stage: Job Control
lessons.description: Run commands in the background, manage jobs, and detach processes from your terminal.
